name: Spore-Nest Forager
visual_description: A small bioluminescent fungal creature with a bulbous mushroom-cap body glowing pale blue-green, sprouting delicate tendrils and spore wisps. Fragments of corroded metal and ancient circuitry are embedded in its gelatinous form. It crouches low, examining a piece of rusted machinery with visible curiosity, surrounded by drifting spores.
full_prompt: A small bioluminescent fungal creature with a bulbous mushroom-cap body glowing pale blue-green, sprouting delicate tendrils and spore wisps. Fragments of corroded metal and ancient circuitry are embedded in its gelatinous form. It crouches low, examining a piece of rusted machinery with visible curiosity, surrounded by drifting spores.. Stylized digital illustration, wide naturalist composition, rich earth tones with dappled light, layered depth, post-apocalyptic science-fantasy setting.
